ddls:
CREATE TABLE "commodities" (
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each commodity */,
  "commodity_name" TEXT /* Name of the commodity (e.g., Copper, Gold) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the commodity */,
  "commodity_type" TEXT /* Type of commodity (e.g., metallic, non-metallic) */,
  "unit_category" TEXT /* Category of units used for the commodity (e.g., weight, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit */,
  "unit_name" TEXT /* Name of the unit (e.g., kt, kg, mt) */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "unit_symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the unit (e.g., kt, kg, mt) */,
  "unit_category" TEXT /* Category of the unit (e.g., weight, volume) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the production site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the production site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of production site (e.g., mine, refinery) */,
  "capacity" REAL /* Production capacity of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_partners" (
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading partner */,
  "partner_name" TEXT /* Name of the trading partner */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the trading partner */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the partner */,
  "partner_type" TEXT /* Type of trading partner (e.g., supplier, buyer) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "production_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production data entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the commodity produced */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date of production */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("production_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES production_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trade_data" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade data entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the commodity traded */,
  "trade_date" TEXT /* Date of trade */,
  "trade_value" REAL /* Value of the trade in million dollars */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., export, import) */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trade_data_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES trading_partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market share data entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "share_percentage" REAL /* Market share percentage */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date of the market share data */,
  "market_size" REAL /* Size of the market */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_shares_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "commodity_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity */,
  "price_value" REAL /* Price value in dollars per unit */,
  "price_date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "price_source" TEXT /* Source of the price data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_commodity_prices_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., data entry clerk, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user (e.g., production, finance, market research) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being accessed */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_site_commodities" (
  "site_commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site-commodity entry */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the production site */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity produced at the site */,
  "production_capacity" REAL /* Production capacity for the commodity at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_site_commodities_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES production_sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_site_commodities_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_partner_commodities" (
  "partner_commodity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each partner-commodity entry */,
  "partner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trading partner */,
  "commodity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the commodity traded with the partner */,
  "trade_volume" REAL /* Average trade volume for the commodity with the partner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("partner_commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_partner_commodities_commodity_id FOREIGN KEY ("commodity_id") REFERENCES commodities ("commodity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_partner_commodities_partner_id FOREIGN KEY ("partner_id") REFERENCES trading_partners ("partner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation rule */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being validated */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column being validated */,
  "rule_type" TEXT /* Type of validation rule (e.g., range, format) */,
  "rule_description" TEXT /* Description of the validation rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table being versioned */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
